name: Smoke Bomb
effect: Automatically succeed at a retreat check.

name: Raider's Kit
effect: Gain +2 on a raid this turn.

name: Throwing Knife
effect: Deal 2 damage to a target on your cell or an adjacent cell.

name: Ward Scroll
effect: Gain Guarded until your next turn.

name: Fortune Card
effect: Reroll any one d6 you just rolled.

name: Trap Kit
effect: Add a temporary trap to an owned property; first enemy raiding before next world phase suffers -1 on the raid.
